subcodes.first_line: O spiritual herald! Your letter was received, and assuredly by now my photograph will have reached the blessed hands of that beloved one [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بشیر روحانی نامه شما رسید و البته تا بحال عکس فانی بدست مبارک آنحبیب
subcodes.subjects: @photographs and recordings, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @humility; meekness; lowliness
